site.name: Arnab Paryali
site.title: Arnab Paryali - Software Engineer | React Native & Next.js
site.description: I'm Arnab, a software engineer who's spent 5+ years building React Native and Next.js apps that actually ship. Currently at Metafic, previously led the frontend team at Indus Net Technologies.
site.keywords: Arnab Paryali, Software Engineer, React Native Developer, Next.js Developer, TypeScript Engineer, Frontend Engineer, Mobile App Developer, UI Animations, Cloudflare Workers, Astro, Kolkata, India, Hire React Native Developer, Arabic RTL Developer, Bilingual App Developer, Gulf Region, React Native Arabic, Portfolio
site.tagline: I've been writing React Native and Next.js for five-plus years and I still get a little too excited about smooth animations. TypeScript everywhere, cross-platform by default — including a stint building bilingual Arabic/English apps for the Gulf with full RTL. Used to lead frontend at INT, now building at Metafic.

contact.notice: Using Proton Mail, so yes - your message is encrypted end to end. I usually reply within a day.
contact.terminalIntro: > hey, you found the terminal. type 'help' to see what's here.

experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Building production React Native applications across the company's mobile product suite
Engineering cross-platform mobile experiences with a focus on performance and UI polish

experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Led the frontend team delivering React Native and Next.js engagements for enterprise clients
Owned project scoping, feasibility studies, and SOW preparation across mobile and web work
Established frontend conventions and mentored engineers across the team

experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Promoted to Assistant Tech Lead in February 2023, within 7 months of joining
Built React Native apps featuring realtime data sync, Twilio chat, and complex UI animations
Developed Node.js REST APIs and integrated Firebase JS SDK for auth and realtime data
Owned end-to-end mobile feature delivery from spec to release

experience.title: Developer
responsibilities: Delivered Next.js, React, and React Native projects for clients across multiple industries
Handled requirements gathering, design, implementation, and deployment independently

projects.title: Real Estate Platform
projects.description: Property platform for the Gulf market. Bilingual Arabic/English UI with full RTL layout and AI-assisted listings — designed for regional users from day one, not bolted on after.
projects.outcome: Full RTL support with AI-assisted listings shipped to production

projects.title: Spare Parts Marketplace
projects.description: Mobile app and website for a vehicle spare parts manufacturer. Inherited an underperforming codebase and led a full optimization pass across animations, bundle size, and rendering.

projects.title: B2B Health Platform
projects.description: B2B health improvement app built around habit enforcement, AI-powered evaluation, and a semantic practice recommendation engine. Sole mobile engineer, from architecture to in-app purchases.
projects.outcome: End-to-end delivery — architecture, AI integration, IAP, and App Store release

projects.title: School Discovery App
projects.description: Platform helping parents in Colorado find and compare schools for their kids. Smart semantic search, comparison tools, and a smooth animated UI designed to make a genuinely hard decision feel a bit easier.
projects.outcome: Smooth animated UI with smart school-matching search

projects.title: Celebrity Fan Platform
projects.description: Social platform for celebrities and their fans — think exclusive content, direct chat, and the ability to book a custom session or meeting with the person you follow. Four distinct user roles in a single app.
projects.outcome: Multi-role app with exclusive content, chat, and booking flows

projects.title: Fashion on Demand
projects.description: Apparel marketplace with 2-hour delivery, built as a single app with four modes — buyer, seller, logistics agent, and creator/model. Each role gets its own tailored experience inside the same codebase.
projects.outcome: One app, four roles — buyer, seller, logistics, and creator

projects.title: TGVCBot
projects.description: Telegram Voice Chat music bot using JioSaavn & YT Music as sources. Supports media transcoding, multiple bot instances, and queue management.

projects.title: XorGram
projects.description: Telegram userbot framework built on grammy.js. Enables programmatic control of Telegram user accounts via a command interface.

projects.title: AnimeDB
projects.description: Anime & manga search bot for Telegram. Fetches data from the AniList API with inline query support and genre filtering.

projects.title: Bin-Lookup
projects.description: npm package to search BIN details across multiple sources. Supports credit card validation and bank identification.

projects.title: aproxy
projects.description: Anonymous proxy server with proxy rotation, scraping, and health checking. Built for privacy-conscious routing.

projects.title: emulaunch
projects.description: CLI tool to list and launch Android/iOS emulators and simulators. Supports hot reload triggers and device filtering.

projects.title: Dropbox-Index
projects.description: Website to publicly index and share Dropbox folders. Provides clean file listings with download links.

projects.title: whatspurr
projects.description: WhatsApp bot library wrapping baileys / whatsmeow. grammy-style API for building WhatsApp bots with minimal boilerplate.

jokes: Why did the developer quit his job? He didn't get arrays.
How many programmers does it take to change a light bulb? None, that's a hardware problem.
A SQL query walks into a bar, sees two tables and asks, "May I join you?"
Why do programmers always mix up Halloween and Christmas? Because Oct 31 == Dec 25.
